%% -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
%% ROLE: engine-vendored — DO NOT edit here. `scitex-writer update-project`
%% overwrites this file on every re-vendor; fix it upstream in the
%% scitex-writer package instead (local edits are lost, and update-project
%% may set it read-only in the consumer workspace after vendoring).
%% File: 03_revision/base.tex
\UseRawInputEncoding

%% ----------------------------------------
%% SETTINGS
%% ----------------------------------------
\input{./03_revision/contents/latex_styles/columns}
\input{./03_revision/contents/latex_styles/packages}
\input{./03_revision/contents/latex_styles/formatting}
\input{./03_revision/contents/latex_styles/commands}
\input{./03_revision/contents/latex_styles/commands_diff}

%% ----------------------------------------
%% START of DOCUMENT
%% ----------------------------------------
\begin{document}

%% ----------------------------------------
%% Frontmatter
%% ----------------------------------------
\begin{frontmatter}
%% Title + authors from the 00_shared SSoT (the manuscript_diff is latexdiff'd
%% from the assembled manuscript, so it inherits this automatically).
\input{./00_shared/title}
\input{./00_shared/authors}
\end{frontmatter}

%% ----------------------------------------
%% Introduction
%% ----------------------------------------
\input{./03_revision/contents/introduction}

%% ----------------------------------------
%% Editor
%% ----------------------------------------
\pdfbookmark[1]{Editor}{editor}
\input{./03_revision/contents/editor/E_01_comments}
\input{./03_revision/contents/editor/E_01_response}
\input{./03_revision/contents/editor/E_01_revision}

\input{./03_revision/contents/editor/E_02_comments}
\input{./03_revision/contents/editor/E_02_response}
% \input{./03_revision/contents/editor/E_02_revision}

%% ----------------------------------------
%% Reviewer #1
%% ----------------------------------------
\pdfbookmark[1]{Reviewer \#1}{reviewer1}

\input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer1/R1_00_comments}
\input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer1/R1_00_response}
% \input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer1/R1_00_revision}

\input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer1/R1_01_comments}
\input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer1/R1_01_response}
\input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer1/R1_01_revision}

\input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer1/R1_02_comments}
\input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer1/R1_02_response}
% \input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer1/R1_02_revision}

%% ----------------------------------------
%% Reviewer #2
%% ----------------------------------------
\pdfbookmark[1]{Reviewer \#2}{reviewer2}
\input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer2/R2_00_comments}
\input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer2/R2_00_response}
% \input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer2/R2_00_revision}

\input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer2/R2_01_comments}
\input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer2/R2_01_response}
\input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer2/R2_01_revision}

\input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer2/R2_02_comments}
\input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer2/R2_02_response}
% \input{./03_revision/contents/reviewer2/R2_02_revision}

%% ----------------------------------------
%% Conclusion
%% ----------------------------------------
\input{./03_revision/contents/conclusion}

%% ----------------------------------------
%% REFERENCE STYLES
%% ----------------------------------------
\pdfbookmark[1]{References}{references}
\bibliography{./03_revision/contents/bibliography}
\input{./03_revision/contents/latex_styles/bibliography}

%% ----------------------------------------
%% END of DOCUMENT
%% ----------------------------------------
\end{document}

%%%% EOF
